commands.review_summary:
Adds a macOS node-mode TLS session cache keyed by gateway URL and TLS pin parameters, with Swift tests for reuse and rebuild behavior.

PR surface: Other +78. Total +78 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The source path is clear: current main supplies a fresh TLS session identity into `GatewayNodeSession`, and the linked macOS WSS proof demonstrates repeated connected callbacks before the cache and one callback after it.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because review found no blocking defect; exact-head CI and mergeability can gate the armed automerge path.

Makes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90736 merge-ready for the ClawSweeper automerge loop.
The edit pass should inspect the live PR diff, review comments, and failing checks; rebase if needed; keep the contributor branch credited; and stop only when validation is green or an external blocker is proven.
